title: Floralcraft 80cm x 50m Frosted Cellophane, Florists Flowers Hampers Gifts Wrapping with Frosted (Black)
features: A premium quality cellophane wrap made from high-quality food-grade material. It easily helps elevate any gift or bouquet, no matter the occasion
Cellophane wrap roll is safe, non-toxic, beautiful and hygienic. Because it is 100% food-grade safe food, it can keep your food or bouquets fresh and clean
Can be used to wrap presents, flowers, candy, artwork, hampers, etc. You can wrap it separately or match it with other beautiful paper to make your gift look more shinny.
The cellophane wrap roll helps make it durable. The higher durability resists rips and tears and helps provide additional support for baskets, gifts, treats, toys, and more.
Just cut the cellophane wrap roll to the size you want, cover it on the gift, and then wrap your gift bouquet or fruit
description: Floralcraft cellophane wrap is a versatile packaging material typically derived from high quality material and became popular for various packaging applications due to its transparency, moisture resistance, and ability to be heat-sealed.
